positive: Minimalist illustration of a cosmic wave cresting over a stylized landscape. The wave should feature swirling nebula colors (deep indigo, violet, sapphire blue) contrasting sharply with crisp, geometric white and gold accents that suggest cosmic energy. Include subtle, symmetrical celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized constellations forming a clear, impactful silhouette. Use a clean, flat design aesthetic with bold lines and high contrast. Composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. Dramatic, clean lighting emphasizing the outline. Vector art style, symmetry, high detail, ultra high resolution.
negative: text, words, logos, trademarks, watermark, signature, messy, blurry, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low quality, jpeg artifacts, low resolution
